[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 01100011 4
2 10111110 6
3 11111111 a
4 10000001 2
5 10100000 2
6 01111011 6
7 01100011 4
